name: polaris-computer-use
description: Control the computer using keyboard, mouse inputs, and capture screenshots via MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Control mouse, keyboard, and capture screenshots.
interface.longDescription:
Allows the AI agent to control the computer's mouse, keyboard, and capture screenshots using native OS automation APIs. Built in Rust for low latency. Cross-platform: macOS, Windows, Linux.

Requires: cargo build --release (first time only).
defaultPrompt: Take a screenshot of the current screen.
Click on the button at coordinates [100, 200].
Type 'Hello World' into the active window.
